name: Quip
tagline: Read Quip threads, folders, and messages
description: Retrieve a Quip document/thread, list recently updated threads, search threads by text, get folder contents, and read thread messages.

auth.hint: Generate a Quip Personal Access Token (or complete OAuth 2.0) and send it as Authorization: Bearer <ACCESS_TOKEN>.

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Retrieve a Quip thread (document, spreadsheet, or chat) by ID.

params.name: id
params.description: Quip thread ID or secret path.

tools.name: list_recent_threads
tools.description: List the authenticated user's recently updated threads.

params.name: max_updated_usec
params.description: Only return threads updated before this microsecond timestamp, for paging.

params.name: count
params.description: Maximum number of threads to return.

tools.name: search_threads
tools.description: Search the authenticated user's threads by matching text.

params.name: query
params.description: Text to search for across thread titles and content.

params.name: count
params.description: Maximum number of matching threads to return.

params.name: only_match_titles
params.description: Restrict matching to thread titles only.

tools.name: get_folder
tools.description: Retrieve a Quip folder and its children by ID.

tools.name: get_messages
tools.description: Retrieve the most recent chat messages for a thread.

params.name: thread_id
params.description: Quip thread ID to read messages from.

params.name: max_created_usec
params.description: Only return messages created before this microsecond timestamp, for paging.

params.name: count
params.description: Maximum number of messages to return; maximum 100.
